rulings.Case Title: MELVIN HOLDEN VS. HSBC BANK USA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-661918 WITH CASE CGC-19-575423
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 12, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF MELVIN HOLDEN, NANCY HOLDEN MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-661918 WITH CASE CGC-19-575423 DENIED without prejudice. Moving parties failed to comply with the Court's May 30, 2019 Order requiring Plaintiff to provide the Court with courtesy copies of the moving papers to Dept. 501 no later than June 3, 2019. Additionally, Moving Parties failed to comply with the requirements of a motion to consolidate in CRC 3.350. Moving parties should also note that there is currently a default entered against them in CUD-18-575423. = (501/CFH)
